reasoning: Experience: 12+ years as a full-stack engineer (exceeds 6+ years requirement).
Primary stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React (used in multiple roles).
Backend experience: Node.js (TypeScript), Java, Kotlin (mentioned as secondary but used in roles like RIDE Capital and Altom Consulting).
Database experience: MongoDB (Optilyz, GISCollective), MySQL (Altom Consulting), PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned but SQL is listed.
AI agent experience: Directly mentioned in current role (re:cinq) with MCP and AI agent infrastructure.
Testing: Mentions TDD, CI/CD, Jest/Vitest/Playwright not explicitly listed but testing frameworks are implied.
Security/auth: Not explicitly detailed but general best practices implied through TDD and CI/CD.
Education: BS in Computer Science (meets requirement).
Collaboration: Experience with product and design teams (Optilyz, GISCollective), open-source contributions.
Performance/scalability: Worked on low-latency apps (Dunnhumby), high-throughput systems (Optilyz), and optimized pricing strategies.
Gaps: No explicit mention of Nest.js (primary stack), Vitest (primary testing framework), or GCP/Azure (secondary cloud).
Language diversity: Strong with TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python (implied), C/C++ (National Instruments).
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development experience, far exceeding the 6+ years requirement.
Direct experience with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary tech (Java/Kotlin) in enterprise environments.
Proven expertise in AI agent development, cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes), and scalable systems (low-latency, high-throughput).
concerns: Primary stack includes Nest.js and Vitest, which are not explicitly mentioned in the resume.
No explicit experience with GCP or Azure (secondary cloud platforms mentioned in the job description).
Degree in Computer Science meets the requirement, but photography degree may raise questions about focus (though it's listed as a separate degree).

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience and primary stack match
AI agent development and cloud expertise

response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo has extensive full-stack experience (12+ years) with a strong match to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Java/Kotlin). Her work in AI agent infrastructure, scalable systems, and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes) is highly relevant. Minor gaps in Nest.js and Vitest are offset by deep experience in testing (TDD, CI/CD) and other testing frameworks. The photography degree is a non-technical degree but is balanced by a BS in Computer Science.
